Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENTS

Title: Relates to other post-employment benefits reserve funds for counties, cities, villages and towns
Summary: Authorizes the governing board of any county, city, village or town to establish one or more other post-employment benefits reserve funds for the financing of all or part of the cost of providing other post-employment benefits to eligible retired employees and their dependents.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general municipal law, in relation to other post-employment benefits reserve funds for counties, cities, villages and towns
